history.text: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.

The image displays a dark background with several elements. At the top, there are four anime-style character portraits. The left two portraits feature a character with blonde hair and pink eyes, with the text "Biji" below them. The right two portraits show a character with gray hair and red eyes, with the text "EDAN" below them. Below these portraits, there are two bullet points. The first bullet point reads "Wajib menjaga etika dan saling menghargai antar member" which translates to "Must maintain ethics and respect each other among members." The second bullet point states "Kirim Foto & Video 1x lihat jika tidak penting" which means "Send Photos & Videos viewable 1x if not important." A red arrow points from the right side of the image towards the first bullet point. The overall content appears to be a set of community guidelines or rules, possibly for an online group or forum, presented with anime-style reaction images. There is no nudity or explicit content visible in the image.
